ddls:
CREATE TABLE "instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial instrument */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the instrument */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the instrument */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock exchange where the instrument is traded */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the company */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the instrument is traded */,
  "company_website" TEXT /* URL of the company's website */,
  "isin" TEXT /* International Securities Identification Number */,
  "cusip" TEXT /* Committee on Uniform Securities Identification Procedures number */,
  "sedol" TEXT /* Stock Exchange Daily Official List number */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the instrument's data */,
  "ticker_data_source" TEXT /* Source of the ticker data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instruments_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the stock exchange */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the exchange */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the stock exchange's website */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the stock exchange was founded */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the stock exchange */,
  "trading_hours" TEXT /* Trading hours of the stock exchange */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the exchange's data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "daily_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price entry */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price data */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the instrument */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the instrument on the given date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the instrument on the given date */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the instrument */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the instrument on the given date */,
  "adj_close_price" REAL /* Adjusted closing price to account for corporate actions */,
  "trading_volume" TEXT /* Total trading volume in the currency of the instrument */,
  "turnover_rate" REAL /* Turnover rate of the instrument on the given date */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the price data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_daily_prices_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technical_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each technical indicator entry */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the indicator data */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the technical indicator (e.g., Moving Average, RSI) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the technical indicator */,
  "indicator_type" TEXT /* Type of the technical indicator */,
  "timeframe" TEXT /* Timeframe of the indicator */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the technical indicator data */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the indicator's data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_technical_indicators_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., individual investor, institutional client, analyst) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the portfolio was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the portfolio */,
  "total_value" REAL /* Total value of the portfolio */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the portfolio's data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_portfolios_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_instruments" (
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio entry */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the instrument in the portfolio */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Purchase price of the instrument */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the instrument was purchased */,
  "current_value" REAL /* Current value of the instrument in the portfolio */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the portfolio entry */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the instrument in the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_instruments_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_instruments_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES user_portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)
